entry.title: Public archive for Delving Bitcoin
entry.summary: The discussion highlights the limitations of archiving online forums, emphasizing that such archives can only capture the content present on the website at the time of archiving, not posts that have been deleted. There's an encouragement to use individual archiving solutions like [archive.org](http://archive.org) and [archive.is](https://archive.is/) for preserving specific posts which might be at risk of deletion due to moderation policies. This approach, however, does not provide a browsable archive of topics and their comments, suggesting a gap in current archival methodologies for online discussions. The advice provided suggests implementing personal archiving processes using available tools to safeguard information that could potentially be removed from the original source.
